story.title: Paper Lanterns
story.logline: A gifted teen cartographer discovers maps that rewrite memory and must decide what to preserve.

character.summary: A precise, anxious mapmaker who fears forgetting her family history.
character.title: Lead Character

character.summary: A reckless friend who values reinvention over continuity.
character.title: Counterpoint Character
character.notes: Could become influence character or antagonist depending on narrative direction.

theme.summary: Memory as inheritance versus memory as burden.

plot.summary: A hidden atlas offers to erase pain by redrawing the past.
Competing map factions chase contradictory versions of the same city.

genre.summary: Magical realism with adventure pacing and introspective tone.
genre.title: Genre Direction
